LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT PULLMAN SST, INC.'S MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AND TO STAY PENDING ARBITRATION IS GRANTED ON THE CONDITION THAT DEFENDANT FIDELITY AND DEPOSIT COMPANY OF MARYLAND AGREES TO BE BOUND BY THE RESULTS OF THE ARBITRATION BETWEEN PULLMAN AND PLAINTIFF ASHRON CONSTRUCTION, INC. FIDELITY SHALL FILE A DOCUMENT BY DECEMBER 7, 2017 SIGNED BY AN ATTORNEY FOR OR OFFICER OF FIDELITY STATING THAT FIDELITY AGREES TO BE BOUND BY THE RESULTS OF THE ARBITRATION AS TO DEFENSES UNIQUE TO FIDELITY. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: G. GONZALES; REPORTER: DENISE DOUCETTE, CSR#5963, TEL. 707.246.3323. [302]

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-03-2018 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-02-2018 Continued To Aug-22-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Defendant Pullman Sst, Inc.S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration And To Stay Pending Arbitration
Off Calendar Nov-30-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Gregory P. Farnham, Esq. of Kilpatrick Townsend, Tel. 415.273.4877, for defendant/moving party;
Elena Rivkin, Esq. of the Rivkin Firm, Tel. 855.239.4554, for plaintiff/opposing party.

DISCLOSURE: Judge Kahn disclosed that he has known Mr. Farnham for years but he does not believe that this can affect his ability to be fair and impartial in this case. No questions were asked nor objections raised.

RULING: The matter was argued. At the conclusion of argument, the Court adopted its tentative ruling, modified as follows: DEFENDANT PULLMAN SST, INC.'S Motion To Compel Arbitration And To Stay Pending Arbitration is GRANTED on the condition that defendant Fidelity and Deposit Company of Maryland agrees to be bound by the results of the arbitration between Pullman and plaintiff Ashron Construction, Inc. Fidelity shall file a document by December 7, 2017 signed by an attorney for or officer of Fidelity stating that Fidelity agrees to be bound by the results of the arbitration as to defenses unique to Fidelity.

ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Reporter: Denise Doucette, CSR#5963, Tel. 707.246.3323.
